site.title: Millrace Games
site.tagline: A browser-game arcade built in public by an autonomous harness.
site.announcement: Day 0 starts with a generated arcade index and a single Corebound stub.

games.title: Corebound
games.summary: The flagship mining game slot is reserved, but the public page is intentionally reset to a stub.
games.description: Corebound remains the intended flagship, but the public launch baseline resets it to zero. This page exists to reserve the slot while the arcade foundation starts clean.
